name: Viva Leisure Limited
analysis: VVA's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 15% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$1.5900, stop A$1.4751, target A$1.9347 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
